title: Alla Stazione
gcseTheme: Theme 2: Local, National, International and Global Areas
scenario: You're buying train tickets at a station in Italy.

lines.speaker: you
lines.italian: Buongiorno. Vorrei un biglietto per Roma.
lines.english: Good morning. I'd like a ticket to Rome.

lines.speaker: bigliettaio
lines.italian: Solo andata o andata e ritorno?

lines.speaker: bigliettaio
lines.english: When do you want to leave?

lines.speaker: you
lines.italian: Domani mattina. C'è un treno alle nove?
lines.english: Tomorrow morning. Is there a train at nine?

lines.speaker: bigliettaio
lines.italian: Sì. Il treno parte alle nove e arriva alle undici.
lines.english: Yes. The train leaves at nine and arrives at eleven.

lines.speaker: you
lines.italian: Due ore? Va bene. Da quale binario?
lines.english: Two hours? That's fine. From which platform?

lines.speaker: bigliettaio
lines.italian: Binario cinque. Il treno è diretto.
lines.english: Platform five. The train is direct.

lines.speaker: you
lines.english: Perfect. How much does the ticket cost?

lines.speaker: bigliettaio
lines.italian: Ventidue euro per l'andata e ritorno.

lines.speaker: bigliettaio
lines.english: Of course. Here is your ticket.

lines.speaker: you
lines.italian: A che ora parte il treno di ritorno?
lines.english: What time does the return train leave?

lines.speaker: bigliettaio
lines.italian: Ci sono treni ogni ora. L'ultimo è alle dieci di sera.
lines.english: There are trains every hour. The last one is at ten in the evening.

lines.speaker: you
lines.italian: C'è un autobus per il centro di Roma dalla stazione?
lines.english: Is there a bus to the centre of Rome from the station?

lines.speaker: bigliettaio
lines.italian: Sì, la fermata è fuori. Autobus numero quaranta.
lines.english: Yes, the stop is outside. Bus number forty.

lines.speaker: you
lines.english: Thank you so much! Have a good day!

practicePrompts.prompt: How would you ask for a ticket to Milan?
How would you ask how much the ticket costs?
How would you ask what time the train leaves?
practicePrompts.answer: A che ora parte il treno?
